sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { useToast } from '../ToastContext'; export default function PrescriptionPage({ prescription, onBack }) { const { addToast } = useToast(); const rx = prescription || mockRx; const handlePrint = () => { window.print(); }; return (
{/* Prescription document */}
{/* Header */}
M
MedConnect Bangladesh
TELEMEDICINE PLATFORM
BMDC Registered · Digital Prescription
Rx #{rx.id || '0001'}
Date: {rx.date}
{/* Doctor info */}
Prescribing Doctor
{rx.doctor_name}
{rx.doctor_spec || 'Internal Medicine'}
BMDC Reg: {rx.bmdc || 'A-12345'} ✓
Patient
{rx.patient_name || 'Patient Name'}
Age: {rx.patient_age || 'N/A'} · {rx.patient_gender || 'N/A'}
Phone: {rx.patient_phone || 'N/A'}
{/* Diagnosis */}
Diagnosis
{rx.diagnosis}
{/* Medicines */}
Prescribed Medicines
{(rx.medicineList || defaultMeds).map((m,i) => ( ))}
# Medicine Dose Frequency Duration
{i+1} {m.name} {m.dose} {m.freq} {m.duration}
{/* Notes */} {rx.notes && (
Instructions
{rx.notes}
)} {/* Footer */}
This is a digitally issued prescription via MedConnect Bangladesh.
Verify at: medconnect.com.bd/verify/{rx.id || '0001'}
Doctor's Signature
); } const mockRx = { id:'0012', date:'2026-04-10', doctor_name:'Dr. Fahmida Begum', doctor_spec:'Pediatrics', bmdc:'A-34567', patient_name:'Arif Hossain', patient_age:8, patient_gender:'Male', patient_phone:'01711-XXXXXX', diagnosis:'Acute Pharyngitis with mild fever', notes:'Take medicines after meals. Drink warm liquids. Rest for 3 days. Avoid cold drinks and ice cream. Follow up if fever persists beyond 3 days.', medicineList: [{ name:'Amoxicillin 250mg Syrup', dose:'5ml', freq:'3 times/day', duration:'7 days' },{ name:'Paracetamol 120mg Syrup', dose:'5ml', freq:'Every 6 hours (if fever)', duration:'3 days' },{ name:'Cetirizine 5mg Syrup', dose:'2.5ml', freq:'Once at night', duration:'5 days' }] }; const defaultMeds = [{ name:'Amoxicillin 500mg', dose:'1 tablet', freq:'3 times/day', duration:'7 days' },{ name:'Paracetamol 500mg', dose:'1 tablet', freq:'Every 6 hours', duration:'3 days' }];
